content: Project Overview

This proposal outlines the design and development of a mid-rise commercial building inspired by traditional Gothic architecture. The project aims to deliver a visually iconic structure that merges historical aesthetics with modern engineering, creating a premium destination for offices, retail, and public engagement.

caption: Fig 1. Primary facade with vertical emphasis and pointed arches

content: Design Philosophy

The architectural vision draws from classical Gothic principles such as verticality, light expression, and ornamental complexity. These elements are translated into a contemporary form using modern materials and construction techniques.

caption: Fig 2. Grand interior hall with vaulted ceiling

content: Project Scope
The scope covers architectural design, structural engineering, facade development, and integration of building systems. The building will accommodate mixed-use functionality across multiple floors.
Spatial Layout & Zoning
The building layout is organized to support commercial, public, and executive functions with a clear vertical zoning strategy.
Materials & Detailing
Material selection emphasizes durability and authenticity while adapting Gothic elements into modern construction methods.
Interior & Commercial Spaces
Interior environments are designed to provide modern functionality while preserving the grandeur of Gothic spatial aesthetics.

caption: Fig 6. Office space integrated within classical architecture

content: Sustainability & Environment
Sustainability is integrated into the design through energy efficiency, material selection, and environmental planning.

caption: Fig 7. Building integrated with surrounding environment

content: Lighting & Night Identity
Lighting design enhances the dramatic expression of Gothic architecture, particularly during nighttime.

caption: Fig 8. Night illumination highlights vertical structure

content: Construction Phases
The project is structured into multiple phases to ensure controlled and efficient execution.
Final Vision
The completed structure will stand as a modern commercial landmark rooted in timeless Gothic design principles, offering both functional excellence and architectural distinction.
